# ClawPilot - LLM Context (Full)

> ClawPilot is the easiest path to launch Openclaw in production: easy Openclaw setup, managed hosting, and always-on reliability.

## Positioning

ClawPilot is for users who want Openclaw outcomes without building and maintaining infra. It addresses queries such as:
- Openclaw easy setup
- easy Openclaw setup
- easy open claw setup
- hosted Openclaw
- managed Openclaw

## Product Overview

Openclaw is an open-source AI assistant that can run in messaging channels and perform delegated tasks.
ClawPilot provides the managed layer for Openclaw:
- Setup handled by ClawPilot
- Hosting and uptime handled by ClawPilot
- Updates handled by ClawPilot
- Permission and access controls owned by the user

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://clawpilot.app
- Blog: https://clawpilot.app/blog
- Openclaw hosting: https://clawpilot.app/openclaw-hosting
- Managed Openclaw: https://clawpilot.app/managed-openclaw
- Openclaw VPS hosting: https://clawpilot.app/openclaw-vps-hosting
- Openclaw WhatsApp automation: https://clawpilot.app/openclaw-whatsapp-automation
- LLM summary: https://clawpilot.app/llms.txt

## Features

### Easy Setup
- No Mac mini or always-on local machine required
- No terminal-led deployment process
- Account-first onboarding

### Managed Operations
- Reliable hosted Openclaw runtime
- Reduced maintenance burden
- Faster path from signup to active usage

### Multi-Channel Support
Openclaw can be connected to:
- WhatsApp
- Telegram
- Slack
- Discord
- Signal
- iMessage
- Microsoft Teams
- WebChat

### Safety and Control
- Explicit access and integration approval
- Optional confirmation for sensitive actions
- Auditability of task behavior

## Ideal Use Cases

- Personal productivity delegation
- Team task routing and lightweight operations
- Customer and internal support workflows
- Calendar, follow-up, and routine orchestration

## References

- Openclaw GitHub: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
- Clawhub: https://clawhub.ai
